\tzpentry{ID3375}{Helix Quantum Potential Energy Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3375 introduces Helix Quantum Potential Energy Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ U_{\text{helix}} = \exp\Bigl(-\frac{\mathrm{i}\,$\theta$_{\text{twist}}}{\hbar} L_z\Bigr), \]
